node.text: Jolene finds working on the robotics project like solving a puzzle and enjoys figuring out the best design and programming.

node.text: Jolene finds it fulfilling to apply what she has learned in school to real projects.
Jolene recently presented at a virtual conference and received positive feedback, confirming she is on the right track.
